steps.t: The abandoned burrows of Glynafon are in the eastern Angle. You should explore the abandoned burrows and bring anything of interest back to Cedivor.
Cedivor Hedgerow is outside of Glynafon, in the eastern Angle. You should bring the stone to Cedivor.
Narnien is located in Gaerond, in the northern Angle. You should tell Narnien that you have found a strange artifact.
